chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A. No.S- 111 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of MA-1052/18 2. For hearing of main case. 05.12.2019. Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for applicant. Mr. Dildar Ali Khan, advocate for respodnents No.3&4. Mr. Ghulam Shabbir, Assistant A.G. Sindh. ==== The facts in brief necessary for disposal of instant Revision Application are that the applicant filed a suit for recovery of Rs.6,53,333/-against the respondents. It was decreed on 07.11.2017 by learned Senior Civil Judge, Golarchi at Badin, such decree was set-aside on 05.03.2018 by learned 2nd Additional District Judge, Badin with a direction to learned Senior Civil Judge, Golarchi at Badin to frame an additional issue with regard to the fact as to whether the respondents No.3 and 4 are bound to pay monthly salary to the applicant and then to pass fresh judgment and decree, which is impugned by the applicant before this Court by way of preferring the instant Revision Application. At the very outset, learned counsel for the parties consented for remand of the matter to learned appellate Court 2 for decision on merit as according to them the issue which is directed to be framed was already framed by learned trial Court. In view of above, with consent of learned counsel for the parties, the judgment and decree of learned appellate Court are set-aside, the appeal would now be deemed to be pending before learned appellate Court and would be disposed of on merit in accordance with law. The instant Revision Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
